brief: US politics dominate with Trump's new tariffs on Canada and withheld Medicaid funds, while Google releases three new Gemini AI models and France bans social media for under-15s. In science, a rare-disease center launches, and a Seattle raccoon named Jimothy goes viral.
news_summary: Trump imposes 50% tariffs on Canadian goods and withholds $1B in Medicaid funds, while Google launches three new Gemini AI models. France bans social media for under-15s, and a New Jersey software glitch registered 6,600 noncitizens to vote.
papers_summary: Papers focus on AI-assisted information evaluation, multitasking with computer use agents, and LLM-generated explanations for code. Other work covers player reflection in games, Mars rover drive retrieval, and hypervelocity impact tracking.

en.brief: US politics dominate with Trump's new tariffs on Canada and withheld Medicaid funds, while Google releases three new Gemini AI models and France bans social media for under-15s. In science, a rare-disease center launches, and a Seattle raccoon named Jimothy goes viral.
en.news_summary: Trump imposes 50% tariffs on Canadian goods and withholds $1B in Medicaid funds, while Google launches three new Gemini AI models. France bans social media for under-15s, and a New Jersey software glitch registered 6,600 noncitizens to vote.
en.papers_summary: Papers focus on AI-assisted information evaluation, multitasking with computer use agents, and LLM-generated explanations for code. Other work covers player reflection in games, Mars rover drive retrieval, and hypervelocity impact tracking.

zh.brief: 今日头条包括英国新首相上任、厦门翔安机场引发台湾安全关切、深圳地铁加强安检等。学术方面关注AI辅助信息评估和人机交互设计。
zh.news_summary: 英国贝安德成为新首相；厦门机场距金门仅3公里引发军事担忧；深圳地铁临时加强安检；台湾将首次模拟断网演习；智能戒指提前发现怀孕；澳洲诞生罕见同卵四胞胎；阿里速卖通被欧盟罚款5.5亿欧元。
zh.papers_summary: 今日无中文论文，英文论文探讨了AI辅助信息评估、计算机使用代理的多任务设计等议题。

todays_image.caption: Like a raccoon's tenacious grip on a prize, Troy Jackson tightens his hold on Maine's Democratic Senate nomination.
todays_image.title: Common Raccoon, Racoon, Raccoon
